title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking is not accepted [Android]
scenario: User denies location permission during Find My Device onboarding on Android, but the permission flow does not properly handle the rejection and fails to proceed.
steps: Launch the app on an Android device
Proceed to the Find My Device flow
When the location permission prompt appears, tap 'Deny'
Observe the behavior after denying the permission
expected: The user should be able to skip the location permission step and continue with the onboarding process after denying the permission.
